items.text:
Making you look as if you’re supposed to be in the role.

I specialise in expression-led, casting-ready headshots that read clearly on Spotlight and other casting platforms.

Most of my sessions are shot indoors in a more controlled and comfortable environment, whatever the weather decides to do outside.

If you want to work in the comfort of your home (or a place near you), I can come with the studio to you. If you don't mind travelling, you're welcome in my studio in Grantham, Lincolnshire.

Feel free to reach out via DM or via:

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

items.text:
Most people will watch this reel and think…

“That looks terrifying.”

They’re right.

That’s exactly why you should do it.

One weekend. One microphone. One chance to prove to yourself you’re capable of more than you think.

Stand-up comedy isn’t instant talent.

It’s technique.

And you’ll learn it from multi-award-winning comedian Jed Salisbury before performing live in front of an audience.

People travel from all over the UK for this.

Your turn? 🎤

🎟️ https://buy.stripe.com/14A28r5bs5pZ5aw0oi4gg0y

#StandUpComedy #YorkshireEvents #ConfidenceBuilding #ChallengeYourself #LiveComedy

Casting Call – Babies & Toddlers
👶 Newborn babies up to 3 months old
🧒 Toddlers up to 4 years old
Filming: Various days in June and July
Location: Surrey area
Applicants must live in Hampshire or Surrey.
For more information, please contact Kelly at Kelly@dubjuniors.com.
Please feel free to share with family, friends, and anyone who may be interested.

items.text:
Actors don’t just sell talent.

They sell energy.

The way you approach a self-tape, an audition, a room, or even an email sends a message long before your performance does. Positive energy travels. People feel it. And people want to work with people who make them feel good.

Your energy is part of your casting.

🔗 linktr.ee/mattzina

#ActingTips #ActorsLife #SelfTapeSuccess #ActingCareer #MattZina

items.text:
A moving story about a teenager facing her own immortality far too young, who wants to be in charge of eulogy. And why not all she needs is a witness.

#beforei'mdeadplay @theglitch_se1 @dramagroups

sharedPost.text:
@everyone

CANNIBALS WANTED!

Exciting news, everyone!

We’re looking for volunteers to join us for one of the biggest and most atmospheric sequences in The Eight Saga: N.E.S.T. Project , our Cannibal Camp scenes filming in Chester on the 10th, 11th, 12th, and 13th of June.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, creative, or simply someone who wants to be part of an ambitious independent feature film, we’d love to have you with us.

This is a volunteer production powered by an incredible community of passionate creatives. What we may lack in budget, we make up for with dedication, professionalism, creativity, and an unforgettable experience. With over 200 creatives involved in the project, this is a fantastic opportunity to gain experience, build your portfolio, network with like-minded people, and become part of something special.

Bring your own tent.
Bring your own post.
apocalyptic,cannibal-style costume if possible.
Meet fellow creatives and filmmakers.
Gain hands on feature film experience.

Can’t make all four days? No problem! Even joining us for a single day is a huge help and greatly appreciated.

Come for the filmmaking, stay for the adventure, the stories, and the community.

If you’d like to be involved, let us know below or send us a message.

See you in the wasteland.

#NESTProject #IndependentFilm #FeatureFilm #Filmmaking #VolunteerActors #FilmCommunity #PostApocalyptic #BehindTheScenes #ChesterFilming

items.text:
## 📣 CASTING CALL: NON-UNION TALENT (LOS ANGELES/LONG BEACH AREA) 📣

**PROJECT:** GardaWorld - ECAM + GWS _ B-roll Content Shoot 

**ROLE:** GWS Agent (General) 

**UNION STATUS:** Non-Union 

**RATE:** Paid, Full Image Buyout

## 👤 PROFILE SOUGHT 
* **Quantity:** 1 Talent
* **Age/Look:** Young, multiethnic, fit, and confident (mid-30s-mid-40s would be ideal
* **Character Note:** No smiling (stern/professional demeanour).
* **Wardrobe:** Will require a full uniform and an Ambassador badge (provided on set).

## 📅** SHOOT DETAILS**
* **Date:** Monday, June 15, 2026
* **Location:** Near Long Beach Airport (LGB), CA
* *Local hires only (no travel or accommodation provided).*

## 📩 HOW TO APPLY

If you are available and fit the description, please submit by email to: **andreanne.fc@noba.com by Friday, June 5.**

**Subject Line:** GWS Agent - [Your Name]

**Please include:**
1. Full-length body photos (recent, clear lighting, no filters).
2. Your current measurements/sizes.
3. Your contact information.

🚫 **NO DMs PLEASE.** Direct messages on Facebook will not be reviewed. 
⚠️ *Due to the volume of submissions, only pre-selected candidates will be contacted.*

Thank you! 🙏

topComments.text: Andréanne Fluet-Chabot where's the love to the thickens hahahaha

items.text:
Most actors will read this and do nothing. That is fine. This is not for them.
I am Freya Tingley. Two Netflix series regular roles. Six feature film leads. Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood.
Once Upon a Time on ABC.

Started at 14. No connections. No money. No Hollywood family. Signed with a top Hollywood agent by 17. Booked a Netflix series regular at 18, three months after moving to LA.

That is not luck. That is a strategy I can prove works, because I have run it on myself and watched it work on the
actors I have quietly coached for years.
Here is what most actors are doing.

Training, thousands of dollars.
New headshots, hundreds.
Self-tapes, no bookings.
Waiting for agents to call.

Years burned. Bank accounts drained. Confidence destroyed.

Here is what working actors are actually doing.

Optimising for the one specific skill that determines booking rate.
Engineering the conditions for representation to chase them.
Generating their own opportunities when reps go quiet.
Treating their career like a business, not a lottery ticket.

That is the difference. And nobody teaches it.

So I am running 2-hour private 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. Just you and me. Fully tailored to your career stage.

What you get:
• A diagnosis of why you are stuck, specific not generic
• The booking skill audit, will rewire how you audition
• A representation strategy if you do not have an agent
• A re-activation strategy if your agent has gone cold• A self-generated opportunity plan you can run this month
• My exact materials checklist

Outcome: you leave with a written plan. No confusion. No "what now". Just execution.

If you know you are ready, DM me "COMMIT" to apply.

I take a handful of these a month. That is it.

items.text:
🎙️ VOICEOVER ARTIST NEEDED – Paid  | London | 9th June
Looking for a male voice actor, 50s–60s+, with an English accent for a paid studio recording session.

The project is an MFA Goldsmiths Fine Art visual/audio piece – an independent, non-commercial work. The dialogue is philosophical, poetic, and sometimes argumentative, exploring ideas about the present world, emotion, and the future – all set within a conversation between four characters inside a car.

📅 Date: Tuesday 9th June

⏱️ Duration: ~4 hours

📍 Location: E1 4NS, London (in-person studio)

💷 Rate: £80 + travel expenses reimbursed

looking for someone with a strong, characterful voice and the ability to take direction.

If you’re interested or know someone who might be, please drop me a email with your folio x 

yanyuetaozhi@gmail.com

Thank you! 🙏

topComments.text: £20 an hour for a voiceover artist? That’s a rip off.
Be careful people, they profile isn't encouraging

items.text:
🎭📸 ACTORS, MODELS & YORKSHIRE FOLK — WE NEED YOU!

Just two weeks ago, Yorkshire Chronicles didn’t exist.

Today, thousands of people are following our stories about Yorkshire’s hidden history, local legends, mysteries and haunted locations.

Now we’re looking for real Yorkshire faces to become part of future stories.

Whether you’re:
🎭 An actor
📸 A model
🎬 A creator
🏡 A local resident
👻 A paranormal enthusiast
🐶 Or even proud of your furry friend…

Post a headshot, a full-length photo and tell us where you’re from.

Your photos remain yours. We claim no ownership whatsoever. Any images used will only be with your permission and may be enhanced with AI to help bring Yorkshire’s stories to life.

We’ve also got exciting collaborations coming soon, including experienced mediums and a ghost-hunting team familiar to TV audiences.

👇 Post your photo below.

👀 Your story could be next.

🔄 Please share this with friends, actors, models and fellow Yorkshire folk.

#YorkshireChronicles #YorkshireHistory #YorkshireLife #ActorsUK #ModelsUK #WestYorkshire #YorkshireLegends #GhostStories

sharedPost.text:
🚨 YOUR FACE IN YORKSHIRE CHRONICLES? 🚨

Just two weeks ago, Yorkshire Chronicles didn’t exist.

Today, thanks to all of you, we’ve built an incredible community sharing Yorkshire’s history, mysteries, legends and forgotten stories.

Now I’d like some of you to become part of them.

📸 To put yourself forward, simply post:

✅ A headshot

✅ A full-length photo

✅ Your location

No experience needed.

Whether you’re a Yorkshire Chronicles follower, actor, model, creator, presenter, photographer, paranormal enthusiast—or simply proud to be from Yorkshire—I’d love to hear from you.

👻 Historical recreations

🏚️ Haunted locations

🕵️ Mystery investigations

📜 Forgotten Yorkshire stories

🐾 Pets welcome too!

🤖 Some images may be creatively enhanced using AI to help bring Yorkshire’s stories to life.

🔒 Your photographs remain yours. You keep full ownership at all times.

🎥 We also have experienced mediums and members of a well-known TV ghost-hunting team joining future projects.

👇 ONE QUESTION 👇

If Yorkshire Chronicles came to your town tomorrow…

What story should we investigate?

Tag a friend, share this post, and let’s build something special together.

📸🎬👻

items.text:
Yours truly is back here again 🙂 currently acting, casting, running 2 businesses and a full time job. Oh and 2 young kids! I need another vacation!!! 😢

The web series I have been casting for Netflix is finally going on floors and the final few character requirements have come up. 

Please send a couple of photographs and a Spotlight link if available to Farhan.baqi@mcccuk.co.uk

There is urgency on this and we need to tape these parts by the end of this weekend, therefore please apply as soon as possible if you fit the brief. 

Brief below : 

1. Prison Warden – Caucasian woman, 30–40 years old.  Someone on the heavy side please

2. Jewellery Merchant – looking for a Middle Eastern/Arab merchant. slick looking, 30–35 years old. 

3 Indian male actor, British or American born. Early 20s and should be able to do a good American accent from NewY York.

4 British African male actor 30 to 35, we are considering options who are either muscular well built or very thin in their physical appearance.

Shoot dates : TBC but tentatively from July
Day Rate : £300 plus expenses 
Shoot location : UK exact location TBC
Shoot days : TBC

Thank you ☺️ 
Farhan Baqi
Mukesh Chhabra Casting (MCCC)

topComments.text: Sounds too good to be true

items.text:
**PILNY CASTING!!! - ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

Bardzo pilnie, do zamkniętego serialu kryminalnego dla jednej z platform, poszukuję **CHŁOPCA w** **wieku 6-10 lat.**

Zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie. 

Rozpoczynają się w połowie lipca i potrwają do października 2026. 

Rola chłopca to ok. 10 dni zdjęciowych.

**Chłopiec to zapalony kibic, pełen energii łobuziak,  wysportowany i lubiący grać w piłkę nożną. **

**W zgłoszeniu bardzo proszę o przesłanie poniższych krótkich materiałów filmowych: **

1. Krótkiej wizytówki dziecka - imię nazwisko, wiek i krótką wypowiedź o swoich zainteresowaniach np. sport, gry itp.

2. Krótkie, spontaniczne nagranie kibicowskich przyśpiewek lub dopingu ulubionej drużyny piłkarskiej piłkarskiej.

Zgłoszenie proszę wysyłać poprzez formularz:

https://form.jotform.com/261513807079056

**ZGŁOSZENIA PROSIMY PRZESYŁAĆ D0 7 CZERWCA.**

**EWENTUALNE ZDJĘCIA PRÓBNE ODBĘDĄ SIĘ 13-14 CZERWCA W WARSZAWIE.**

** **

Zapraszamy osoby polskojęzyczne w wieku 17–60 lat do udziału w nagraniach programu jako publiczność!

To świetna okazja, by zobaczyć telewizję od kulis, poczuć atmosferę prawdziwego planu zdjęciowego i przeżyć wyjątkową przygodę🎬

sharedPost.text:
POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: 
Seniorzy z charakterem (80+) 

Do wyjątkowej artystycznej sesji zdjęciowej  operatora nominowanego do Oscara poszukujemy osób w wieku 80 lat i więcej (rocznik 1930 - 1940)
Szukamy twarzy z historią – autentycznych, naturalnych i zbalansowanych życiowym doświadczeniem. Interesuje nas czyste, prawdziwe piękno dojrzałego wieku, dlatego szukamy osób, które wyglądają naturalnie na swój wiek.
Twarze naturalne, z widocznymi zmarszczkami i unikalnym wyrazem (bez zabiegów medycyny estetycznej zmieniających rysy twarzy)

Masz w rodzinie babcię, dziadka, ciocię lub sąsiada, którzy idealnie pasują do tego opisu? A może to właśnie Ty chcesz wziąć udział w tym projekcie? Pokażmy razem piękno dojrzałości!

📩 **JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?**
Wyślij zgłoszenie na adres e-mail: 
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com
wpisując w tytule SENIOR

- Imię, nazwisko oraz wiek.
- Aktualne, wyraźne zdjęcie twarzy (w naturalnym świetle, bez filtrów!) 
- Numer telefonu do kontaktu

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

items.text:
**CASTING | „Stawka większa niż życie"**

Szukamy aktorki do krótkometrażowego filmu realizowanego w ramach **Świetlicy Filmowej w Krakowie.**

**ROLA: MATKA** 35–40 lat. Ciemne włosy. Kobieta, która nosi w sobie więcej, niż pokazuje. Nieco zmęczona życiem, ale wciąż walcząca. W filmie staje przed sytuacją, której nie da się kontrolować. I właśnie to jest w niej najbardziej ludzkie.

**PROJEKT** 7-minutowy film krótkometrażowy. Produkcja non-profit. Oferujemy materiały backstage do portfolio.

**SCENARIUSZ: **Trójka bohaterów trafia po drugiej stronie na sąd ostateczny, który okazuje się być teleturniejem. Prowadzący zadaje pytania, leci confetti, śmieje się publiczność. Tyle że zasady gry nie są uczciwe. Pod absurdalną formą kryje się historia o stracie, winie i bezradności wobec czegoś, czego żaden system nie jest w stanie ogarnąć.

**DATA: **13–14 czerwca w Krakowie. 

**ZGŁOSZENIA** Przyjmujemy do 8 czerwca wyłącznie mailowo: marcin.marcinfilmuje@gmail.com

W mailu prosimy o: 
* zdjęcie portretowe,
* zdjęcie sylwetki,
* portfolio lub link do dotychczasowych realizacji.

Zapraszamy aktorki zawodowe, studentki szkół teatralnych i filmowych oraz osoby bez formalnego wykształcenia aktorskiego z pasją i odwagą przed kamerą. :)

Dziękuję

attachments.ocrText: Brak dostępnego opisu zdjęcia.

items.text:
**CASTING | „Stawka większa niż życie"**

Szukamy aktorki do krótkometrażowego filmu realizowanego w ramach **Świetlicy Filmowej w Krakowie, **inicjatywy wspierającej młodych krakowskich filmowców stawiających pierwsze profesjonalne kroki w branży.

**ROLA: ASYSTENTKA** Kobieta w podeszłym wieku. Zadbana, stanowcza, pewna siebie i swojej roli. Przetwarza 120 tysięcy dusz dziennie i widziała już absolutnie wszystko. Jej miejscem pracy są zaświaty, ale traktuje to jak każdą inną robotę z  procedurami i zimną kawą w kubku.

**PROJEKT** 7-minutowy film krótkometrażowy. **Produkcja non-profit.** Oferujemy materiały backstage do portfolio. 

**SCENARIUSZ: **Trójka bohaterów trafia po drugiej stronie na sąd ostateczny, który okazuje się być teleturniejem. Prowadzący zadaje pytania, leci confetti, śmieje się publiczność. Tyle że zasady gry nie są uczciwe. Pod absurdalną formą kryje się historia o stracie, winie i bezradności wobec czegoś, czego żaden system nie jest w stanie ogarnąć.

**DATA: **13–14 czerwca w Krakowie.

Poszukujemy aktora po państwowej szkole aktorskiej do udziału w realizacji znanego serialu.

📍 Lokalizacja zdjęć: Wrocław
📅 Dni zdjęciowe: 8 i 9 czerwca 2026 r.

💰 Stawka: 1000 zł brutto za dzień zdjęciowy

Do zobaczenia na planie!🎬

items.text:
Now more than ever, artists need to care for themselves — not only their work, their craft, or their mission.

Devotion doesn’t have to feel like a rat race.

In the noise of city life, auditions, deadlines, bills, notifications, and pressure, it’s easy to forget that the body is not just an instrument of labor. It is the place we create from.

This retreat is an invitation to return to the city regulated, empowered, informed, and alive.

For one weekend in Gardiner, NY, we will step into deep, focused work: movement research, meditation, yoga, somatic practice, conditioning, physical storytelling, character work, scene work, and conversations around intimacy, fight scenes, boundaries, ethics, and consent.

And in between — nature, sauna, Jacuzzi, nourishing meals from local Hudson Valley produce, and meaningful connection with like-minded artists.

June 18–21
@groundworks.space 
Gardiner, NY
items.previewTitle: Movement for Actors Retreat w/ Omri Drumlevich and Zina Zinchenko | Groundworks
items.previewDescription: An immersive retreat for trained actors seeking a deeper relationship to movement, presence, expression, and the pleasure of being fully alive in the body. By invitation only.
items.title: Movement for Actors Retreat w/ Omri Drumlevich and Zina Zinchenko | Groundworks

items.text:
SANTA CASTING CALL - Christmas at Bewl Water 2026
Do you have what it takes to bring the magic of Christmas to life? Christmas at Bewl Water is looking for talented, warm and engaging performers to portray Santa within one of the South East's most magical family Christmas experiences.

Set within beautiful woodland beside Bewl Water, our immersive festive adventure welcomes thousands of families each year. Through storytelling, character meet and greets and unforgettable Christmas magic, our performers help create memories that last a lifetime.

The Role

As Santa, you will be at the heart of the experience, meeting families throughout the day and creating authentic, magical interactions with children and their loved ones. We're looking for performers who can embody the warmth, kindness and wonder of the character while remaining fully immersed in the story world.

We're Looking For

• Strong performers with excellent improvisation and audience engagement skills

• Confident communicators who enjoy interacting with children and families

• Warm, patient and charismatic personalities

• Previous performance, entertainment or Santa experience is welcomed but not essential

📍 Location: Bewl Water, Kent

📅 Auditions: 15th & 22nd June 2026

🎄 Performance Dates: Late November – 24th December 2026

💼 Paid Freelance Contract

Requirements

• Aged 18+

• Right to work in the UK

• DBS check (or willingness to obtain one)

• Full availability across rehearsals and performance dates

To apply, please send your CV, headshot and showreel/improvised video to:

chloe.gifford@bewlwater.co.uk

Do you have what it takes to bring the magic of Christmas to life? Christmas at Bewl Water is looking for talented, warm and engaging performers to portray Santa within one of the South East's most magical family Christmas experiences.

Set within beautiful woodland beside Bewl Water, our immersive festive adventure welcomes thousands of families each year. Through storytelling, character meet and greets and unforgettable Christmas magic, our performers help create memories that last a lifetime.

The Role

As Santa, you will be at the heart of the experience, meeting families throughout the day and creating authentic, magical interactions with children and their loved ones. We're looking for performers who can embody the warmth, kindness and wonder of the character while remaining fully immersed in the story world.

We're Looking For

• Strong performers with excellent improvisation and audience engagement skills

• Confident communicators who enjoy interacting with children and families

• Previous performance, entertainment or Santa experience is welcomed but not essential

items.text:
**Audition Notice (Chattanooga)**

1) "The Man on the Middle Cross" - A Staged Reading of a New Original Musical (book in hand)

2) 6 Roles Available (multiple characters for 4 roles): Male & Female (18+)

3) Paid opportunity ($150.00 stipend)

4) Union Status: Non-Union (Union actors welcome to submit)

5) 4 rehearsals (August 3, 6, 11, 13) + staged reading (August 15)

**Synopsis**

This is the unusual and untold story of the repentant thief, from boyhood to the cross to the gates of heaven. Throughout his journey, loyalty and friendship collide with deception and betrayal. A most improbable outcome at the cross sets him on a path toward an unexpected obstacle at the gates of heaven.

A unique blend of musical styles: Pop, Rock, Country, British Music Hall, Folk, Hip-Hop, and Contemporary Musical Theatre.

**Audition Info**

In Person only - July 13 & 14

Submission Deadline - June 5 (extended to Monday, June 8)

**Link to submit and full details:** [https://form.jotform.com/261006476414048](https://form.jotform.com/261006476414048)

"Two friends. Two dreams. Two eternal outcomes"'

items.text:
🎬 **Casting Call Alert!**

We’re looking for talented performers for **MAMA**, a fantasy drama student short film exploring grief, healing, and the connection between the physical and spiritual worlds.

🎞 **Production Name:** *MAMA*
📍 **Location:** Berlin
🎓 **Produced as part of the Master’s program at MetFilm School Berlin**
🎥 **Shooting Dates:** July 14–20 (3 shooting days + rehearsals)
💰 **Low-budget student production**

🎭 **Roles:**
* INTIMBA - Female, 40s–50s
* TSIKO - Female, 20s–30s
* JINYA - Male, 30s–40s

🌍 This project is inspired by East African folklore, African masks, and the cultural traditions that shape the film’s spiritual world.

We particularly encourage submissions from performers of African heritage. East African heritage is a strong plus, though not required. Movement and/or dance experience is also a plus.

📩 **If you're interested, please send your headshot, CV, and/or demo reel to:**
**abril.arap.film@gmail.com**

Help us bring this visually rich and emotionally resonant story to life.

We can’t wait to see your submissions! 🌙✨

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Drehtage 08.06.26 und 09.06.26, gedreht wird nähe Grafenau im Bayerischen Wald. Wir brauchen noch Darsteller/innen, Komparsen, die Bewohner eines Bauerndorfes und schwarze Ritter spielen, die dieses Dorf überfallen und belagern. Ebenfalls werden noch zwei schwarze Ritter gesucht, mit Text (mit Dialog). Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße (für die Rollen mit Dialog ist ein Vorstellungsvideo erforderlich) bitte an Harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger an Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
CASTING CALL
A non-union Black sapphic narrative short film about loss, love, and the rich cultural spiritual traditions that process it all.

Shoots in Detroit, late summer 2026, tentative Spring 2027

LEAD — CANEISHA, mid-40s to 50s, Black masc-presenting/stud/androgynous. Grief-stricken, but warm and entertaining before losing the love of her life.

LEAD — LOVIE, late 40s to 50s, Black, dark-skinned or medium-brown, femme-presenting, free-spirited and goofy, with a classic case of eldest sister syndrome that still resides in her. 

SUPPORTING — AFENI, mid-40s to 50s, Black, medium-brown or dark-skinned, masc-presenting, tender best friend, kind of a hippie. 

SUPPORTING — AZRAELIA, mid-30s to mid-40s, dark-skinned Black woman, witty younger sister, ambitious and trendy businesswoman. Ideally full-figured.

SUPPORTING — PAPA MONTGOMERY - late 70s to 90s, Black, if y'all don't get y'all grandfather involved in a film. Playful and lively. 

COMPENSATION: This is a microbudget project. Currently we can guarantee profit shares from the film, but we are working on honorariums for each principal role. We're also working on funding to hopefully assist with travel or lodging for non-locals.

HOW TO APPLY:

Submit a good quality photo, resume, age, a reel if you have one and interest to freedomdrumfilm@gmail.com and casting director MacKenzie Galloway at mackenziegallowayllc@gmail.com. Sides will be sent upon receipt. Supplemental dramatic and comedic monologues are welcome. 

Stay involved with the project @freedomdrumfilm.

View the casting call on Instagram and Backstage: 

https://www.instagram.com/p/DX6qXEEDmME/?igsh=Z2g4aWNkMmF3dDE3

https://www.backstage.com/casting/freedom-drum-3147338/

items.text:
**JOB:** Web Series — Recurring Host Role 

**CASTING:** Open gender, 25-45, strong on camera presence **LOCATION:** Long Beach, California, USA 

**COMPENSATION:** Paid — $1,000 per shoot day, rate open to discussion as series develops 

**CONTACT:** chloe@muhameds.com 

**TIME(S):** Accepting submissions now, production ongoing

Non-union. Seeking a host for a short form branded web series for a wellness and performance drink company shooting at a professional sound stage in Long Beach.

The character is knowledgeable, worldly, and genuinely curious — someone who's done the research and can't stop talking about what they found. Think less polished spokesperson, more fascinating person you met at a dinner party who happens to know everything about the history of medicinal mushrooms and isn't weird about it. Each episode covers a single functional ingredient — its origins, the science, why it matters. Scripts are provided but the right person will make them feel completely natural and uncontrived.

Background or genuine personal interest in health, wellness, nutrition, herbalism, biohacking, or related fields is a real advantage — the content will reward someone who actually finds this stuff interesting.

You are not: a supplement bro or a wellness influencer.

To apply send a short self tape video introducing yourself and why this sounds like your kind of thing. No formal reel required — just show us who you are.

items.text:
CASTING CALL — CASTRATO

Seeking London-based actors for a psychological horror proof of concept set within a 1970s boys’ choir conservatoire.

“The beauty of a choirboy’s voice lies in its transience.”

We are currently casting the roles of:

• Peter (Male, 8–11)

• Albert (Male, 10–14)

• Michel-Cesar (Male, 40–60)

• Nurse Valentina (Female, 35–60)

Shooting in London • 1 day shoot • 13–14 June

Please see poster for full details.

To apply:

castratofilm@gmail.com

items.text:
**ACCENT SEARCH! Regional LEEDS YORKSHIRE accent needed for actors accent breakdown! Native accents only please!**

Is this you? Are you willing to offer around 2 hours of time to help drama students create a northern accent breakdown for their next project? If so please get in touch asap!

This is an unpaid job but will be a chance to build your network with students from the Oxford School of Drama and an opportunity to skill share.

What will be required of you: voice recordings from provided scripts, 10 min interview, collaborative openness.

Thank you for your time 😊

topComments.text:
NORTH LONDON and HERTFORDSHIRE AREAS
Science Boffins is currently looking for more phenomenal Science Boffins to help us to bring science to life for primary school children. We have parties, schools and events throughout the year.
You don't need a formal background in science as we teach you everything you'll need to know.

All you need is access to a car (unless London based), the ability to work some weekends/weekdays and the desire to launch rockets, concoct potions and generally share just how much fun science can be.

HOW DOES BEING A SCIENCE BOFFIN WORK?

For the right person, this could be the most fun way of making an extra income.

You'll get to enjoy inspiring and educating children, having a fantastic time and getting paid along the way. You'll travel to an event in your local area and bring science to life for primary school age children with some brilliant science experiments.

Are you a fun, enthusiastic and reliable person and able to communicate effectively and promptly to potential bookings? Then join a nationwide team of 40+ well-paid Science Boffin presenters.  We have a strong reputation, rave reviews, and the privilege of working with some globally recognised companies.

We're a friendly bunch and have a (we think!) cracking training program to help you get up to speed. If that sounds like you? You too can become one of our amazing Science Boffins and bring science alive to children.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Annette
Science Boffins

items.text:
**We are still seeking actors ages 18 and up! Auditions are due Tuesday!**

**Project: **Cryptophasia

**Type: **Theatre

***Audition Information***

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th.

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5Irm-Jb1muA3Zx8JLaYkrg3vzH2RacBbXQhxl-t0_UEG-PDA-bZB4jx-YGBQ_aem_OvBCwmeD9pLYDsr2RKqTmg)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fforms.gle%2Fj4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5EuBRnCPWdwQ2herTFHH3ZSgRCNVerpoqS20Atm7kv1_cIR4G8eqV1Msn22Q_aem_BOhUsw5S9vorqF6DZ5sWjA&h=AUDZr-FaMO1Cy-qmuCVf8Z3eOmd_L0d7nWR_38zi_0571mVfip6dGhM0CqSDaVBFN8ITlvVj50M1nrqfieWmQZF2TG0ka9xvQqbhU6aTfJkwsmrQbVNR_6RbimctXlTHFBcN&__tn__=-UK*F)

***Dates***

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed *****HERE*****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

***Compensation***

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit.

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre.*

***Show Synopsis***

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

***Character Breakdown***

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

***Production Team***

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

***About Us***

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects.

For questions or to learn more, visit [www.stagebugztheatre.com](https://www.facebook.com/api/graphql/www.stagebugztheatre.com?__tn__=-UK*F) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.
items.previewDescription: Stagebugz Theatre is a 501(c)3 youth theater company dedicated to providing accessible theatre education where every performer is valued and uplifted. We offer affordable acting and musical theatre classes, productions, and summer camps, free workshops, and family-friendly performances!
items.title: Youth Theater | Stagebugz Theatre | Littleton

items.text:
Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - [ROLE NAME] - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Keisha: Female, 30-45. Black or Hispanic/Latina.**

Headstrong, sharp-tongued, stylish, and not afraid to curse someone out when necessary. Keisha designs clothes, accessories, and trinkets that she sells to local mom-and-pop stores. Her long-term goal is to become a successful designer whose work is sold in major department store chains.

**Tone:** Bold, funny, confident, protective, blunt.

2.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous. Bisexual.**The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

 

3.      **Aaron**: **Male, 25-35. Any ethnicity.**

The department brown-noser. Aaron is always trying to impress management, climb the corporate ladder, and make himself look more important than he is. He has a long-running beef with Kenneth and enjoys trying to get under his skin.

**Tone:** Corporate suck-up, petty rival, passive-aggressive, self-important.

 

4.      **Derek**: **Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

The department manager. Derek is positive, supportive, and genuinely wants his team to succeed. He tries to keep the department moving forward while managing strong personalities, office politics, and workplace chaos.

**Tone:** Supportive manager, patient, professional, quietly funny.

 

5.      **Depression**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s depression. Depression is strangely upbeat and excited while delivering negative thoughts, self-doubt, and emotional pressure. This character should feel charming, unsettling, and emotionally dangerous without becoming cartoonish.

**Tone:** Cheerful menace, darkly funny, manipulative, emotionally sharp.

 

6.      **Anxiety**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s anxiety. Anxiety is panicky, restless, and constantly processing too many thoughts at once. They bounce between positive and negative possibilities while trying to calm both Kenneth and themselves down.

**Tone:** Erratic, nervous, fast-thinking, emotionally overwhelmed, sympathetic.

 

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks.  

Shooting Schedule: Planning for the 2nd-3rd weekend of July. 2 day 10 hour shoot.

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.

topComments.text: Where do we send this to?

items.text:
We're a fun, cheeky greeting card brand based in London and we're looking for an actor with real personality to help us create entertaining street content.

The role involves wearing a full lobster costume and approaching strangers in a public London location to ask them fun, light-hearted questions on camera. Think quirky, warm, and genuinely entertaining — not scripted, just confident and charismatic.

What we need from you:

— You must be comfortable wearing a full lobster costume for the duration (provided )
— Confident approaching strangers and keeping the energy up on camera
— Able to improvise and keep things natural and fun
— Available for a 1 to 2 hour shoot at a London location (TBC)
— Comfortable signing a simple usage release for the footage

This is a paid role. Please send your quote along with any relevant experience (performance, presenting, street interviewing, improv, or similar). A short video or showreel showing your personality on camera would be a huge bonus.

If you're the kind of person who would actually enjoy wearing a lobster costume and chatting up strangers — we want to hear from you.
Anashri@lushlobster.com

“ CASTING CALL OPEN NOW “ Large number of contestant places! NO JOINING FEES: NO AUDITIONS: FFES PAID.

Apply for our PILOT EPISODE

Ditching the Ballroom: Why we chose grit over glitz...

Black-tie events have their place, but we believe the most profound change happens when things get real. At CharityMasters, we’re trading champagne flutes for hard work and polished stages for the raw, unscripted reality of making an impact. 

We chose a fly-on-the-wall style because we want to see the sweat, the strategy, and the soul it takes to raise £10M for a new SkyAngels Air Ambulance. This isn't about staged interviews or London-centric glamour. It’s about real people across every corner of the UK rising to a challenge that actually matters. 

We’re looking for true changemakers: individuals who possess confidence, compassion, and a self-starter spirit. We don’t want a performance; we want your authentic journey as you help us fund the next life-saving aircraft. 

It’s time to redefine what charity looks like... 

Are you ready to step into the spotlight for a cause that’s bigger than all of us? Throw your hat in the ring and join the cast. 

Apply: [https://www.charitymasters.media](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.charitymasters.media%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBEwbEhxVWRZeGZvTGtxWXNiRnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR77FAn_sapolX2MeXXPIZMaTT0w_IvfD2y1aJQ32hOQNlYxJr1bPdFZ9tzeXQ_aem_saAh__-tBKvvCtwV8KC3Fw&h=AUDQzLyfjR75lZuWgQQI6Q8s3pirvkOqdEmE8AYub7dQq5XJOtBsWu9Fcu2nc6XVCNcGindad9BUA62OIfZ5ldAVXeH2eOYBYyI1CWgd7TM9WGEnmryX4QybFu2LrSZM5l-8mzxLT_4e0nauiZ-D9g&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUBHxVjTgGZxt6bc8WKfxHsq_Cd93AaLiejlboHKbDIdsbYs6ALluYJ_lj71PO0T8ymvdcU7cZsPiFQzwAowr_mwlR8Krjcru63Bk8OnpZ3N4q36u5IH1FNDYuzBGmZgBvs14p0mOF7S4ASA8a3-RyWVZ1LbrSM8DtNNVxpxQGB512DC2Nk&c[1]=AUArWXq0F8UOnYQsgJvMqMU4g7TXG6NZb7uUATUWQZXXqqvMqFOQ3DjBRT3G4AZMEjaZrje5m0PdyvAVL6f0KZfM-mxjZKKZydBdLkaFEoHxvhFBnS18_9C6or8L5Y5u_7FSYuVFQ8DUMl72BK1l-LB7O9g-zO7XoTNG5UDoyzHjImgMiDs)

items.text:
GRAVE STAKES — OPEN CASTING CALL

Hey everyone! My name is Paul Dächert, I’m a Bachelor directing student at SAE Institute Munich, and I’m currently casting for my thesis film — and I’d love for you to be part of it.

THE FILM

Grave Stakes is a stylized Western dramedy set in a surreal frontier world where death is not an end, but a negotiation. A dying man embarks on a final journey back to his hometown with one goal: to take control over how his life ends. Along the way, a reluctant Death-in-training, a cynical grave digger, and a sharp-witted outlaw woman join him on a road that blends dark humor with existential depth.

Can we truly control how our story ends — or is that the one thing we must learn to let go?

📍 Munich, Germany · 🎬 Sep 10–13, 2026 · 🗣 Filmed in English
💰 No budget · Full catering on set · Showreel footage · Festival submission

THE ROLES

We are currently casting the following five roles:

🤠 Will O’Die — Lead
Male · 30–50 · Black / Afro-descendant
A man at the edge of his life. Dry-witted, quietly stubborn, and carrying both dark humor and real emotional weight. His journey isn’t about survival — it’s about authorship.

🌵 Gloria Sorrow — Lead
Woman · 22–32 · All backgrounds welcome
The sharpest person in every room. Self-possessed, funny, with real warmth underneath the armor. The film never comments on her being a woman. By the end, she’s Sheriff.

💀 Ashford Reaper — Supporting Lead
Open · 25–45 · All backgrounds welcome · ⚠️ British accent essential
Death. In training. Charming, earnest, and reliably incompetent in the most endearing way. The most human character in the film — and the funniest.

🃏 Quinn Alistor — Supporting
Open · 35–55 · All backgrounds welcome
A loveable rogue who would pickpocket Death himself. Runs on charm and self-interest — mostly. Somewhere underneath is one genuine act of kindness that matters more than he’d ever admit.

✝️ The Priest — Supporting
Open · 40–65 · All backgrounds welcome
Rides in unannounced, finds a practice funeral in progress, and steps up to officiate without missing a beat. One scene. One speech. The whole film hinges on it.

HOW TO APPLY

📅 Deadline: July 10, 2026
📩 dachertpaul@gmail.com

Please send:
→ A ~1 minute video in English: your name, age, location, and why a specific role speaks to you
→ A headshot
→ CV & showreel welcome, but not required

Fluent English required. Native speaker preferred — but what matters most is that you feel at home in the language.

We are committed to inclusive casting and warmly encourage actors from all backgrounds to apply. All experience levels welcome. Presence and truth over credits. ❤️

#GraveStakes #CastingCall #ShortFilm #StudentFilm #SAEMunich #OpenCall #CastingGermany #ActorsOfInstagram #WesternFilm #FilmMunich

items.text:
**Our LIVE Actor Q&A.**

**No script. No presentation. Just real questions from actors and honest answers from us, KC and Donna-Marie.**

In this class we answer questions about:

🎬 Why talented actors aren't always booking
🎬 The difference between talent and skill
🎬 What casting directors are really looking for
🎬 How to know if you're making the right choices
🎬 What may be holding your career back right now

If you've ever wondered:

"Am I good enough?"

"Why am I auditioning but not booking?"

"What should I be working on next?"

There's a good chance we've answered it here.

And if you're watching the replay...

**Leave your question in the YouTube comments.**

**We read them, and we'll answer them.**

Watch the replay and ask away. 👇

suchen wir (Musicalgroup e.V.) nach Verstärkung für unser ehrenamtliches Musical-Orchester an der **Gitarre**!

* Notenkenntnisse vorteilhaft

* gemeinnütziges Vereinsprojekt ohne Gagen

* Geprobt wird ab Juli 2026 grundsätzlich jeden zweiten Sonntag in 67117 Limburgerhof bei Speyer

[casting@musicalgroup.de](mailto:casting@musicalgroup.de)

Wir freuen uns auf dich.

items.text:
There’s now less than a month until the DISCOUNTED early bird offer for our Colne Picture Show short film festival ends. If you have a short that’s under 30mins long, submit it today!

This festival is not just about showcasing films but also creating a space for the future of cinema. We aim to help bloom the next generation of artists. 

Hosted at the beautiful Little Savoy Cinema on the 14th November, we hope to create an intimate and personable experience for filmmakers new and old. If you or anyone you know has a film to submit, follow the link below!

items.text:
Hej😊
do serialu Trudne Sprawy poszukuję  dwóch młodych mężczyzn z Wrocławia  lub okolic w wieku 25-35 lat- 1 scena,  mały epizod.  Płatne gotówką po planie.

Zdjęcia 18 czerwca w godz. 12:50 - 14:15.

Odpowiem na wybrane zgłoszenia.

items.text:
SANTA CASTING CALL - Christmas at Bewl Water 2026
Do you have what it takes to bring the magic of Christmas to life? Christmas at Bewl Water is looking for talented, warm and engaging performers to portray Santa within one of the South East's most magical family Christmas experiences.

Set within beautiful woodland beside Bewl Water, our immersive festive adventure welcomes thousands of families each year. Through storytelling, character meet and greets and unforgettable Christmas magic, our performers help create memories that last a lifetime.

The Role

As Santa, you will be at the heart of the experience, meeting families throughout the day and creating authentic, magical interactions with children and their loved ones. We're looking for performers who can embody the warmth, kindness and wonder of the character while remaining fully immersed in the story world.

We're Looking For

• Strong performers with excellent improvisation and audience engagement skills

• Confident communicators who enjoy interacting with children and families

• Warm, patient and charismatic personalities

• Previous performance, entertainment or Santa experience is welcomed but not essential

📍 Location: Bewl Water, Kent

📅 Auditions: 15th & 22nd June 2026

🎄 Performance Dates: Late November – 24th December 2026

💼 Paid Freelance Contract

Requirements

• Aged 18+

• Right to work in the UK

• DBS check (or willingness to obtain one)

• Full availability across rehearsals and performance dates

To apply, please send your CV, headshot and showreel/improvised video to:

chloe.gifford@bewlwater.co.uk

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of tree and text that says 'Christimasa! BewlWaler SANTA CASTING CALL 2026 Join a large-scale immersive Christmas experience for families, filled with live performance storytelling & festive magic. We're looking for talented performers to portray Santa in our immersive family Christmas experience. Bewl Water, Lamberhurst, Kent 17 Auditions: 15th & 22nd June 2026 Performances: Nov Dec 2026 Paid (Freelance) To apply, send the following to chloe. hloe.giffiord@bewlwater.co.uk CV Recent Headshot Showreel and/or improvised audition video christmas.bewlwater.co.uk'

Poszukujemy statystów i aktorów do sesji fotograficznej oraz krótkich  nagrań wideo (TikTok, Reels)

Poszukujemy kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 30+ do udziału w płatnej sesji fotograficznej i produkcji wideo w branży kredytowej. 

Wymagania:  

✅ ukończone 30 lat,  

✅ bardzo dobra znajomość języka polskiego w mowie,

✅  swoboda przed obiektywem i kamerą, 

✅ dyspozycyjność w podanym terminie,

 

📍Lokalizacja: Kraków, okolice Mogilskiej   

 🗓️Termin: 17.06.2026r.  

💰Udział płatny: 150 zł za całość realizacji (2 godziny pracy) 

Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać na adres e-mail: rekrutacja.info.work@gmail.com (ewentualnie na priv)

W wiadomości prosimy o podanie: 

• imienia i nazwiska, 

• wieku, 

• numeru telefonu, 

• aktualnego zdjęcia twarzy oraz zdjęcia sylwetki.

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

Zapraszamy do udziału!

items.text:
Casting call ! :)

1. Wraz z Movie Baker szukamy aktorów do kampanii społecznej. Szczegóły poniżej.

2. Już niebawem ruszamy z naszą aplikacją dla aktorów, epizodystów i statystów. Jeśli chcesz ją sprawdzić jako jeden z pierwszych i zacząć z niej korzystać to zachęcamy do krótkiej rejestracji. Aplikacja będzie darmowa <3

https://moviebaker.app/casting-online-sign-up/

[KAMPANIA SPOŁECZNA - KRAKÓW - 19.06.2026]

Do materiałów promujących NGO (spot i sesja) szukamy:

1) KOBIETA DO ROLI WOLONTARIUSZKI (ROLA GŁÓWNA) - kobieta ok 20-35 lat, doświadczona aktorsko, uśmiechnięta, energiczna, naturalny wygląd. Rola z tekstem.

2) MĘŻCZYZNA DO ROLI WOLONTARIUSZA (ROLA GŁÓWNA) - mężczyzna w wieku 20-35 lat, doświadczony aktorsko, uśmiechnięty, energiczny i naturalny wygląd. Rola z tekstem.

3) KOBIETA DO ROLI SENIORKI (EPIZODYSTA) - kobieta ok 70 lat, najlepiej o siwych włosach. Rola bez tekstu.

4) KOBIETA DO ROLI WOLONTARIUSZKI (STATYSTKA) -  osoba w wieku 20-35 lat, energiczna, naturalny wygląd.

5) MĘŻCZYZNA DO ROLI WOLONTARIUSZA (STATYSTA) -  osoba w wieku 20-35 lat, energiczna, naturalny wygląd.

TERMIN i MIEJSCE:

* Termin zdjęć: piątek 19.06.2026 r. (póki co potrzebna dostępność całodniowa, bliżej terminu podany dokładne godziny.)

* KRAKÓW

TERMIN NADSYŁANIA ZGŁOSZEŃ :

* 10/06/2026 godzina 18:00

POLA EKSPLOATACJI:

Internet: social media, strony www, reklamy perfo, e-mail marketing, aplikacje mobilne

Media: prasa, portale internetowe, TV, radio

Outdoor

Indoor

Kino

Druk: ulotki, plakaty

Prawa: 3 lata, terytorium Polska

WYNAGRODZENIE:

1) KOBIETA DO ROLI WOLONTARIUSZKI (ROLA GŁÓWNA) - 800 PLN netto UoD

2) MĘŻCZYZNA DO ROLI WOLONTARIUSZA (ROLA GŁÓWNA) - 800 PLN netto UoD

3) KOBIETA DO ROLI SENIORKI (EPIZODYSTA) - 500 PLN netto UoD

4) KOBIETA DO ROLI WOLONTARIUSZKI (STATYSTKA) - 100 PLN netto UoD

5) MĘŻCZYZNA DO ROLI WOLONTARIUSZA (STATYSTA) - 100 PLN netto UoD

+ ew. zwrot kosztów dojazdu dla osób spoza Krakowa

ZGŁOSZENIA :

* Imię i nazwisko

* Numer telefonu

* Wiek

* Miasto (preferujemy osoby z Krakowa lub z bliskich jego okolic)

* 3-5 zdjęć (twarz, sylwetka, profile)

* Informacja o posiadanym doświadczeniu reklamowym, filmowym

* Wizytówka w formie linku prywatnego do YT/Vimeo etc. (przy wysyłaniu linków prywatnych prosimy o odblokowaniem opcji dostępu) - OBLIGATORYJNIE

* Informacja o dyspozycyjności we wskazanym dniu

Zgłoszenia wysyłamy na adres casting@rednoses.pl w tytule wpisując „MB casting 1”. Na ewentualne pytania odpowiadamy pod numerem telefonu +48 510 469 221.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Red Noses IIB movie baker CASTING CALL ZDJĘCIA: 19.06.2026 AKTORZY KAMPANIA SPOŁECZNA KRAKOW STATYŚCI SZCZEGÖŁY w OPISIE Nie chcesz przegapić żadnego castingu? Zapisz się do Listy oczekujących na aplikację Movie Baker Casting Online'

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL - MDance Company Tour '27

Für „4Elemente“ suchen wir 1 Tänzerin / 1 Tänzer für die Tour 2027

🔸Gesucht wird:
•Starke Jazz-Technik
•Partnering-Skills
•Erfahrung in Modern / Contemporary / Commercial
•Teamplayer mit starker Bühnenpräsenz

🔸Proben: Osterferien 2027 in Bamberg
🔸Shows:
•7.4.2027 -  BAMBERG 
•17.4.2027 - ERBACH/ODW
•24.4.2027 – ANDERNACH 
•15.5.2027 - NÜRNBERG 
➡️ Bezahlung, Unterkunft, Fahrtkosten (innerhalb Deutschland, Österreich, Schweiz), Verpflegung an Showtagen 

🔸Bewerbung mit
•Anschreiben, indem du uns mitteilst, warum du Teil unseres Teams werden möchtest
•Aktuellem Lebenslauf
•Foto – Headshot und Ganzkörper
•Showreel / Videolink, falls vorhanden
an: 
🔸Melanie Day – Künstlerische Leitung von MDance Creative – info@mdancecreative.com

NUR SERIÖSE BEWERTUNGEN BITTE
 🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹

Casting Call | MDance Company Tour 2027

“4Elements” – A Dance Theatre Spectacle

The MDance Company is looking for one female / one male dancer for the 2027 tour production 

We are looking for
1 Male and 1 Female dancer with:
•Strong jazz technique
•Confident partnering skills
•Experience in Modern / Contemporary / Commercial 
•Strong stage presence
•Teamwork, reliability, and motivation

,🔸Rehearsals
Rehearsals will take place during the Easter holidays 2027 in Bamberg, Germany.
🔸Performances
April 7, 2027 – BAMBERG 
April 17, 2027 - ERBACH/ODW
April 24, 2027 – ANDERNACH
May 15, 2027 - NÜRNBERG 
➡️ Pay, accommodation, travel expenses(within Germany/Austria/Switzerland), food on showdays

🔸Application
Please send your application including:
•Cover Letter telling us why you would like to become part of our Team
|current CV
|photo – Headshot and Full Body
•showreel / video link, if available
to:
🔸Melanie Day – Künstlerische Leitung von MDance Creative – info@mdancecreative.com

SERIOUS APPLICATIONS ONLY PLEASE 

We look forward to your application!

items.title: TWYLA - Short Film

items.text:
TITLE: LAST DEBT

GENRE:
Drama / Thriller

LOGLINE:
A dangerous confrontation between two women reveals betrayal, deception, and a deadly secret that neither can escape.

ROLE:
GABY

• Female
• Age 25–40
• Hard of Hearing preferred
• Fluent in American Sign Language (ASL)
• Must be able to communicate in both ASL and spoken English
• Distinctive appearance preferred
• Strong dramatic acting ability required

Character Description:
Gaby is a complex and emotionally layered woman who appears vulnerable and trustworthy but is deeply involved in a dangerous world of deception, manipulation, and survival. The role requires emotional depth, expressive facial acting, and the ability to perform intense dramatic scenes.

PRODUCTION COMPANY:
Quiet Mile Pictures

Writer:
Martina Bell

Director:
Nicki Runge

Producer:
Martina Bell and Nicki Runge

PRODUCTION TYPE:
Independent Short Film (Non-Union)

RUN TIME:
Short Film (Approximately 5–10 minutes)

COMPENSATION:
Paid

UNION STATUS:
Non-Union

AUDITION INFORMATION:
Initial submission requires:
• Headshot
• Resume
• Demo Reel (if available)

Selected actors will be contacted to submit a self-taped audition.

Submission Deadline:
June 20, 2026

SHOOTING SCHEDULE:
Principal Photography:
July 16–17, 2026

Two-day shoot schedule.

Rehearsal dates to be scheduled with selected cast.

FILMING LOCATION:
Denver, Colorado

CONTACT INFORMATION:
Email: [audition@qmpictures.com](mailto:audition@qmpictures.com)

PROJECT DESCRIPTION:
Quiet Mile Pictures is seeking an actress for the role of Gaby in the upcoming short film Last Debt. We welcome submissions from Deaf, Hard of Hearing, and hearing performers who meet the role requirements. This is a character-driven dramatic thriller with strong emotional performances and limited locations, making it an excellent opportunity for actors seeking substantial screen time in a lead supporting role.

CASTING CALL — CASTRATO

Seeking London-based actors for a psychological horror proof of concept set within a 1970s boys’ choir conservatoire.

“The beauty of a choirboy’s voice lies in its transience.”

We are currently casting the roles of:

• Peter (Male, 8–11)

• Albert (Male, 10–14)

• Michel-Cesar (Male, 40–60)

• Nurse Valentina (Female, 35–60)

Shooting in London • 1 day shoot • 13–14 June

Please see poster for full details.

To apply:

castratofilm@gmail.com

items.text:
Hi All, We are filming short form pieces of commercial content for a mobile game company. That will be used for Social media purposes. 

I'm looking for 4x actors (2x Male / 2x Female) who can have a US Accent and 2x German speakers 1x M/F . Between 28-40yrs old. 

The shoot will be in the middle of July in London. 

You will be paid a day rate and scripts will be provided. 

If you are interested please Email with all your info and past work if any. (Alex@stride-social.com) 

Our company info - [Stride-social.com](http://stride-social.com/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExdFVtb1JFd0x5Y2xwREFrWHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5ZDSlW7SHyOqyLqUrzK0uiGMvmLaTF5s8Ki6QyY3zYXUTdlyIqjQmlBOo7Vg_aem_D5ssCIQ9p8zG2OUDF8nJGA) [https://www.instagram.com/stridetalent/](https://www.instagram.com/stridetalent/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExdFVtb1JFd0x5Y2xwREFrWHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR46ZdONrHwM4c803YejoomAXydDq6n5kzaHO9OjwBLbnQqugtp4VydDRa5sMg_aem_ZlI_MvnIbOHcTjM8ygKYUA)

items.text:
📞CASTING CALL

We’re casting for a test filming of a new social dating show taking place in Central London.
Filming will run from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM on Thursday, 11th June. Food will be provided, and participants will receive £100 to cover expenses.

We’re looking for confident, engaging individuals who are comfortable on camera and open to participating in a fun, interactive dating format. This is a great opportunity to be part of an early-stage concept and help us shape the future of it.

If you’re interested, please send a message or comment below and we’ll be in touch with more details.

items.text: Oferuję montaż demo aktorskiego, według aktualnych wymogów reżyserów obsady. Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :) 🎬

sharedPost.text:
🎥 Montaż demo aktorskiego z konsultacją 

Potrzebujesz demo aktorskiego, które pokaże Twój talent aktorski i wszechstronność a jednocześnie będzie zgodne z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu? Chcesz dowiedzieć się jak pobierać materiały i jak tworzyć takie demo samemu w przyszłości w łatwy sposób oraz jak zwiększyć swoje szanse na konkretną role? Jeżeli tak to zapraszam do skorzystania z mojej usługi 🙂 

✅ dokładnie przejrzę Twoje aktorskie materiały, wybiorę najlepsze aktorsko sceny oraz różnorodne pod względem emocji i ról

✅ zmontuję demo zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu uwzględniając również to, które sceny Ty uważasz za najlepsze 

✅ podczas konsultacji opowiem Ci o obecnych standardach montażu i doboru scen, dam dużo cennych rad abyś mogła / mógł w przyszłości montować demo samodzielnie 

✅ gotowe demo dostaniesz ode mnie maksymalnie w 2 dni od wysłania mi swoich materiałów

✅ przystępna cena 💵 szczegóły na priv 

Na zdjęciach załączam jedną z wiadomość od klienta po moim montażu 🔥💪 

Uwaga! Nie zajmuję się pobieraniem materiałów.

items.title: Oferuję montaż demo aktorskiego, według aktualnych wymogów reżyserów obsady. Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :) 🎬

items.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak oferuję: 
🎬mentoring aktorski 
🎬nagranie wizytówek w Warszawie
🎬montaż demo aktorskiego zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów obsady 

Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :)

sharedPost.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak - zapraszam na konsultacje do mnie, nagranie wizytówek i montaż demo aktorskiego! 🎬🤩 Szczegóły w opisie! 

🎥 Mentoring aktorski 

Dla kogo? 

Dla każdego kto chce pracować jako aktor/aktorka na planach zdjęciowych. Zarówno dla tych bez doświadczenia, któryórzy nie wiedzą jak zacząć i co zrobić jak i dla tych co już pierwsze kroki mają za sobą ale chcieliby mieć więcej pracy i potrzebują rady w tym zakresie 🙂 

Na czym polega? 

Spotkanie ze mną 1:1 online, trwające godzinę. Opowiesz mi jakie zlecenia aktorskie Cię interesują - czyli Twój aktorski cel i według tego dobieramy odpowiedni plan działania. Jeżeli masz materiały aktorskie - to je omówimy i powiem co warto byłoby jeszcze do nich dodać lub jak je “podrasować”. Jeżeli nie masz to dowiesz się co i jak masz zrobić żeby je mieć 🙂 Powiem o moich poleceniach agencji aktorskich, jak samodzielnie i łatwo zrobić demo, jak nagrać i co powiedzieć w wizytówkach, jak samodzielnie szukać pracy, jak się wyceniać, na co uważać. I odpowiem na wszystkie inne Twoje pytania. Po spotkaniu otrzymasz ode mnie maila z planem działania i priorytetami do wykonania + materiałami pomocniczymi dot. materiałów aktorskich. 

🎥 Coaching aktorski z wizytówki + nagranie wizytówek w studio 

Na czym polega? 

✅ Tworzę tekst do wizytówek na podstawie informacji o Twoim doświadczeniu, pasjach, zainteresowaniach, który dostajesz przed nagraniem według castingowych wytycznych, który pokaże Twoje największe atuty

✅W studio nagrań nagrywamy 3-4 wizytówki:

🎬 do filmów i seriali 
🎬 do reklam w wersji dłuższej 
🎬 do reklam w wersji krótszej 
🎬 w języku obcym 
Ewentualnie możemy dograć wizytówkę modelingową 

✅ W trakcie nagrywania zadbam o Twoje rozluźnienie, dobrą atmosferę oraz zrobimy kilka ćwiczeń które pomogą pokazać na wizytówkach Twoją energię i błysk w oku 
oraz będę czuwać nad całym procesem

✅ Wizytówki nagramy według aktualnych standardów i wymogów castingowych 

✅ Dostaniesz zmontowane wizytówki gotowe do wysłania przez WeTransfer

🎥 Demo aktorskie 

montaż demo aktorskiego + konsultacja 

Na czym polega? 

✅ otrzymasz ode mnie demo aktorskie zmontowane zgodnie z obecnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu + podczas konsultacji wspólnie dobierzemy sceny, które się w nim znajdą oraz przedstawię Ci mój pomysł na ich kolejność 

Podczas konsultacji dowiesz się również:

✅ jak pobierać materiały do demo aktorskiego 
✅ jakie są obecne wymogi i standardy wzgledem aktorskiego demo 
✅ jakie sceny wybierać i w jakiej kolejności je zmontować

CASTING!

Do serialu poszukujemy:

👧 Dziewczynki w wieku około 10 lat (główna rola)
👦 Chłopca w wieku 5–6 lat (rola drugoplanowa)

Warunek konieczny: bardzo dobra znajomość języka angielskiego.

Zdjęcia będą realizowane w Warszawie w okresie od 30 czerwca do 10 lipca.

sharedPost.text:
Bass Setup in Berlin 🎸🇩🇪
Fresh bass setup at Letelier Guitar Setup Berlin.
Every instrument is personally handled by Marcelo Letelier, professional musician, guitarist and guitar tech with 20+ years of experience.
A good bass setup can make a big difference: better action, better intonation, better tuning stability and a more comfortable feel for rehearsals, gigs and recording.
Bass setup service includes:
• Action adjustment
• Intonation
• Truss rod adjustment
• Bridge adjustment
• Fret polish
• Tuning stability check
• Basic electronics check
• General cleaning
If your bass has high action, buzzing, tuning problems or poor intonation, feel free to contact me.
📍Berlin / Neukölln area
🛠 Private workshop by appointment
👤 Setup by Marcelo Letelier
📲 WhatsApp: +49 151 24782561
📩 DM: @letelier.guitar.setup
Bass setup Berlin • Bass repair Berlin • Bass guitar setup Berlin • Guitar setup Berlin • Guitar repair Berlin • Guitar tech Berlin • Luthier Berlin • Bass Wartung Berlin • Gitarren Setup Berlin

items.text:
Für unseren Low-Budget Kinofilm „Unter Erfolg“ (AT) sind wir derzeit auf der Suche nach Komparsen aus Berlin und Umgebung. 

Drehzeitraum: 13.07. - 21.08.2026

Alter: 18 bis 55 Jahre

Geschlecht: w/m/d

Wohnort: Berlin und Umgebung

Gage: unbezahlt

Wichtig: Du musst nicht in dem gesamten Drehzeitraum verfügbar sein. Wir planen dich nach deiner Verfügbarkeit ein.

LOGLINE: Zwischen einem dominanten Trainer, der ihn zu formen versucht, und einer jungen Frau, die ihm eine andere Welt zeigt, steht ein junger Tischtennisspieler vor der Entscheidung: weiter funktionieren - oder endlich fühlen.

Meld dich gerne mit deinen Sperrterminen und einem Portrait bei untererfolg@gmail.com mit dem Betreff „Komparsen“.

Wir freuen uns auf dich!

items.title: Für unseren Low-Budget Kinofilm „Unter Erfolg“ (AT) sind wir derzeit auf der Suche nach Komparsen aus Berlin und Umgebung.

sharedPost.text:
@everyone

CANNIBALS WANTED!

Exciting news, everyone!

We’re looking for volunteers to join us for one of the biggest and most atmospheric sequences in The Eight Saga: N.E.S.T. Project , our Cannibal Camp scenes filming in Chester on the 10th, 11th, 12th, and 13th of June.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, creative, or simply someone who wants to be part of an ambitious independent feature film, we’d love to have you with us.

This is a volunteer production powered by an incredible community of passionate creatives. What we may lack in budget, we make up for with dedication, professionalism, creativity, and an unforgettable experience. With over 200 creatives involved in the project, this is a fantastic opportunity to gain experience, build your portfolio, network with like-minded people, and become part of something special.

Bring your own tent.
Bring your own post.
apocalyptic,cannibal-style costume if possible.
Meet fellow creatives and filmmakers.
Gain hands on feature film experience.

Can’t make all four days? No problem! Even joining us for a single day is a huge help and greatly appreciated.

Come for the filmmaking, stay for the adventure, the stories, and the community.

If you’d like to be involved, let us know below or send us a message.

See you in the wasteland.

#NESTProject #IndependentFilm #FeatureFilm #Filmmaking #VolunteerActors #FilmCommunity #PostApocalyptic #BehindTheScenes #ChesterFilming

items.text:
Casting Call For Fast Food Brand World Cup Ad
I’m currently looking to cast 4 actors for a promo shoot on Monday 8th June in Central Liverpool. The shoot is for a fast food chain where we will be filming a few videos for their social media pages advertising their new World Cup menu! Payment is £100 flat rate & food from the company will be provided on set too! Please bare in mind actors will be working around/with meat products too.

We’re ideally looking for 2x male & 2x female performers from different cultures & back grounds so we urge everybody to apply! 

To apply please send a recent headshot & showreel (if possible) to leomoorebusiness@gmail.com 

📆 Monday 8th June

⏰ 12-5pm

📍Central Liverpool

💰£100 Flat Rate

topComments.text: Hi, just sent you an email☺️⚽️✌️

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

Epizodyści TYLKO Z WROCŁAWIA 

 Bartosz Kamiński (32 - 38l.) - były kochanek Pauliny 

Podły, przebiegły, ukrywa przed Pauliną, że jest żonaty. Uroczy, zabawny, rozmowny, lubi żartować. Dużo się uśmiecha. Podoba się kobietom.

items.text:
Royal Shakespeare Company Associate Artist and Cheek by Jowl Associate Director Owen Horsley returns by popular demand for a TWO-DAY intensive workshop for professional actors, focused on exploring and developing a Classical Speech of your choice.

Do you have a classical speech you’re keen to work on? One that feels stuck or needs a fresh perspective?

Across two dynamic days, every participant will have the opportunity to work in depth on their chosen speech (please choose one about 3 mins long). In this Speech Surgery workshop, Owen will guide you through exercises and techniques designed to build confidence and unlock new possibilities within your text.

Come prepared with a speech that is learnt, and within a safe, ensemble-led environment you’ll unlock, re-imagine, and have fun exploring your classical speech in new and inspiring ways.

[https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/2-day-director-intensive-with-owen-horsley-rsc-director-tickets-1990270037258](https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/2-day-director-intensive-with-owen-horsley-rsc-director-tickets-1990270037258)

items.text:
**NOW CASTING UK CONTENT CREATORS** 📣

Paid commercial campaign for Sensodyne.

We’re looking for warm, engaging people who create content online, feel confident on camera, and genuinely experience sensitive teeth.

This is a social-first style campaign focused on real people and authentic conversation, so we’re much more interested in personality, relatability and ease on camera than polished influencer-style content or huge followings.

Lifestyle, wellness, food, parenting, reviews, everyday life, humour etc all welcome.

**Important note:**
This is NOT an influencer deliverables campaign and no posting to your own social channels is required.

**Shoot details:**
• London
• 2nd and/or 3rd July
• Likely 1–2 shoot days

**Fees:**
• £350 per shoot day
• £8,000 usage fee if featured in the final campaign

**If interested, please email:**
casting@casperblackcasting.com

**Please include:**
• Name
• Age
• Location
• Social handles
• Contact number
• A little note about your experience with sensitive teeth

Thank you!

Casper x

Please feel free to tag/share with anybody who may be a great fit ✨

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '@UKCONTENT CREATORS Let'sT Talk Let LetfaTa Talk Le Let alk Le L alk casting@casperblackcasting.com com asting.'

Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

* Film & TV basecamp
* Crew parking

* Commercial shoots
* Special events

Easy access, plenty of space, and flexible availability depending on the date.

items.text:
Do 40. odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie 
(i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujących ról:

1. Ewa (32) – sekretarka, pracownica biura hurtowni, skromnie ubrana, typ zapracowanej mamy, rozbita, pod presją, niezbyt bogata, zadłużona.  
Data: 24. i 27. czerwca
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość 

2. Szefowa (54) – modna i zadbana właścicielka firmy serwisowej, pewna siebie.  
Data: 23. czerwca
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

3. Sylwia Lipka (24) – pracownica magazynu, czujna, rozsądna, reaguje zgodnie z ostrzeżeniem, typ społecznika i zwolenniczka porządku.  
Data: 23. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł netto 

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe ( w przypadku braku materiałów - wybranym osobom prześlę scenkę castingową do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

sharedPost.text:
Pour un institut de soin et de bien-être, nous recherchons :
Critères généraux : modèles avec un grain de peau visible, au physique tonique, et surtout sans aucun tatouage.
- FEMME 1 : phénotype clair, blond vénitien, yeux clairs, environ 30-35 ans
- FEMME 2 : phénotype plus foncé, 40-45 ans
- HOMME : 35-40 ans, visage relativement émacié, physique tonique, "fit", sans poils

Disponibles le 15 juin dans la Vienne (Nouvelle Aquitaine). Résidents du département ou de la Région recommandé.
 
Merci de nous envoyer :
2 photos en portrait
2 photos en pieds
Lieu de résidence
Tel / mail
Expériences éventuelles

Date limite pour postuler : jeudi 6 juin
Candidatures à envoyer à candidature@nocast.fr
Objet : Casting soin et bien-être 15-06-2026

items.text:
⚽ NOW CASTING. DALLAS, TX!

We are looking for outgoing and friendly male bilingual (Spanish and English) Brand Ambassadors to join us for a super exciting Latin Dating App x FIFA activation in Dallas!

Dates: Sunday, July 6 + Monday, July 14 

Time: 1:00 PM – 7:00 PM both days

Location: Dallas, TX (details provided upon booking)

Rate: $35 per hr 

 Requirements:
* Ages 21-35
* Bilingual, English and Spanish required
* Outgoing, friendly, and professional, high energy a must!
* Reliable and punctual

Roles and Responsibilities: engage with attendees, educate guests about the app and promotion, assist with transportation coordination, and help facilitate a smooth and memorable guest journey from registration through ride departure and post-ride next steps.

TO APPLY:

DM @shesocorporate on INSTAGRAM with the word **"Dallas"** 

Thanks!

items.text:
GRAVE STAKES — OPEN CASTING CALL

Hey everyone! My name is Paul Dächert, I’m a Bachelor directing student at SAE Institute Munich, and I’m currently casting for my thesis film — and I’d love for you to be part of it.

THE FILM

Grave Stakes is a stylized Western dramedy set in a surreal frontier world where death is not an end, but a negotiation. A dying man embarks on a final journey back to his hometown with one goal: to take control over how his life ends. Along the way, a reluctant Death-in-training, a cynical grave digger, and a sharp-witted outlaw woman join him on a road that blends dark humor with existential depth.

Can we truly control how our story ends — or is that the one thing we must learn to let go?

📍 Munich, Germany · 🎬 Sep 10–13, 2026 · 🗣 Filmed in English
💰 No budget · Full catering on set · Showreel footage · Festival submission

THE ROLES

We are currently casting the following five roles:

🤠 Will O’Die — Lead
Male · 30–50 · Black / Afro-descendant
A man at the edge of his life. Dry-witted, quietly stubborn, and carrying both dark humor and real emotional weight. His journey isn’t about survival — it’s about authorship.

🌵 Gloria Sorrow — Lead
Woman · 22–32 · All backgrounds welcome
The sharpest person in every room. Self-possessed, funny, with real warmth underneath the armor. The film never comments on her being a woman. By the end, she’s Sheriff.

💀 Ashford Reaper — Supporting Lead
Open · 25–45 · All backgrounds welcome · ⚠️ British accent essential
Death. In training. Charming, earnest, and reliably incompetent in the most endearing way. The most human character in the film — and the funniest.

🃏 Quinn Alistor — Supporting
Open · 35–55 · All backgrounds welcome
A loveable rogue who would pickpocket Death himself. Runs on charm and self-interest — mostly. Somewhere underneath is one genuine act of kindness that matters more than he’d ever admit.

✝️ The Priest — Supporting
Open · 40–65 · All backgrounds welcome
Rides in unannounced, finds a practice funeral in progress, and steps up to officiate without missing a beat. One scene. One speech. The whole film hinges on it.

HOW TO APPLY

📅 Deadline: July 10, 2026
📩 dachertpaul@gmail.com

Please send:
→ A ~1 minute video in English: your name, age, location, and why a specific role speaks to you
→ A headshot
→ CV & showreel welcome, but not required

Fluent English required. Native speaker preferred — but what matters most is that you feel at home in the language.

We are committed to inclusive casting and warmly encourage actors from all backgrounds to apply. All experience levels welcome. Presence and truth over credits. ❤️

#GraveStakes #CastingCall #ShortFilm #StudentFilm #SAEMunich #OpenCall #CastingGermany #ActorsOfInstagram #WesternFilm #FilmMunich

items.summary:
GRAVE STAKES — OPEN CASTING CALL

Hey everyone! My name is Paul Dächert, I’m a Bachelor directing student at SAE Institute Munich, and I’m currently casting for my thesis film — and I’d love for you to be part of it.

THE FILM

Grave Stakes is a stylized Western dramedy set in a surreal frontier world where death is not an end, but a negotiation. A dying man embarks on a final journey back to his hometown with one goal: to take control over how his life ends. Along the way, a reluctant Death-in-training, a cynical grave digger, and a sharp-witted outlaw woman join him on a road that blends dark humor with existential depth.

Can we truly control how our story ends — or is that the one thing we must learn to let go?

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Drehtage 08.06.26 und 09.06.26, gedreht wird nähe Grafenau im Bayerischen Wald. Wir brauchen noch Darsteller/innen, Komparsen, die Bewohner eines Bauerndorfes und schwarze Ritter spielen, die dieses Dorf überfallen und belagern. Ebenfalls werden noch zwei schwarze Ritter gesucht, mit Text (mit Dialog). Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße (für die Rollen mit Dialog ist ein Vorstellungsvideo erforderlich) bitte an Harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger an Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
Do 40. odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie 
(i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujących ról:

1. Ewa (32) – sekretarka, pracownica biura hurtowni, skromnie ubrana, typ zapracowanej mamy, rozbita, pod presją, niezbyt bogata, zadłużona.  
Data: 24. i 27. czerwca
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość 

2. Szefowa (54) – modna i zadbana właścicielka firmy serwisowej, pewna siebie.  
Data: 23. czerwca
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

3. Sylwia Lipka (24) – pracownica magazynu, czujna, rozsądna, reaguje zgodnie z ostrzeżeniem, typ społecznika i zwolenniczka porządku.  
Data: 23. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł netto 

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe ( w przypadku braku materiałów - wybranym osobom prześlę scenkę castingową do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

Für unseren Low-Budget Kinofilm „Unter Erfolg“ (AT) sind wir derzeit auf der Suche nach Komparsen aus Berlin und Umgebung. 

Drehzeitraum: 13.07. - 21.08.2026

Alter: 18 bis 55 Jahre

Geschlecht: w/m/d

Wohnort: Berlin und Umgebung

Gage: unbezahlt

Wichtig: Du musst nicht in dem gesamten Drehzeitraum verfügbar sein. Wir planen dich nach deiner Verfügbarkeit ein.

LOGLINE: Zwischen einem dominanten Trainer, der ihn zu formen versucht, und einer jungen Frau, die ihm eine andere Welt zeigt, steht ein junger Tischtennisspieler vor der Entscheidung: weiter funktionieren - oder endlich fühlen.

Meld dich gerne mit deinen Sperrterminen und einem Portrait bei untererfolg@gmail.com mit dem Betreff „Komparsen“.

Wir freuen uns auf dich!
