items.text:
🚨 CASTING CALL – LOS ANGELES / SANTA MONICA AREA 🚨
We’re currently casting for an upcoming Latin music video and are looking for:

✨ 15 DANCERS
✨ 10 BACKGROUND EXTRAS

📍 Location: Los Angeles / Santa Monica Area
💰 PAID OPPORTUNITY 

(Dancers anywhere from $150-250) 
(Background/ Extras any from $80-120) 

⏰ Approx. 6-hour shoot day
🎥 Professional music video production
📅 Shoot date will be provided to selected talent

DANCERS

* Must be comfortable performing on camera
* Latin dance experience is a plus but not required
* All genders and ethnicities welcome

BACKGROUND EXTRAS

* No acting experience necessary
* Must be comfortable on camera
* All genders, ethnicities, and body types encouraged to apply

To be considered, please send:
📸 Recent photos/headshots
📱 Instagram handle
📍 Current location
📞 Contact information
💃 (Dancers only) Dance reel or video if available

DM me for details or email: [YOUR EMAIL]

Production by @mirrahcreative
For verification: @ddaanielasm

Please tag and share with anyone who may be interested! 🎬🔥 #CastingCall #LosAngelesCasting #LAModels #LADancers #MusicVideoCasting #LatinMusicVideo #BackgroundExtras #SantaMonica #PaidGig #CastingLosAngeles #DanceCasting #LATalent

items.text:
Hi everyone! My name is Chloe, and I’m actively looking for opportunities to work as a Film Production Assistant in film, television, commercials, or other media productions.

I’m a 2024 high school graduate with a strong passion for storytelling, filmmaking, and television production. I have experience with video editing, creative writing, screenwriting, theater arts, and working in fast-paced team environments. I’m reliable, hardworking, organized, and eager to learn from industry professionals.

✅ Valid driver’s license
✅ Willing to relocate anywhere for the right opportunity
✅ Flexible schedule
✅ Strong work ethic and positive attitude
✅ Passionate about film and television production

I’m looking to connect with filmmakers, production companies, crew members, and anyone who may know of PA openings, internships, or entry-level opportunities.

If you have any advice, leads, or opportunities, please feel free to comment or send me a message. Thank you for your time and support!

items.summary:
Hi everyone! My name is Chloe, and I’m actively looking for opportunities to work as a Film Production Assistant in film, television, commercials, or other media productions.

I’m a 2024 high school graduate with a strong passion for storytelling, filmmaking, and television production. I have experience with video editing, creative writing, screenwriting, theater arts, and working in fast-paced team environments. I’m reliable, hardworking, organized, and eager to learn from industry professionals.

✅ Valid driver’s license
✅ Willing to relocate anywhere for the right opportunity
✅ Flexible schedule
✅ Strong work ethic and positive attitude
✅ Passionate about film and television production

I’m looking to connect with filmmakers, production companies, crew members, and anyone who may know of PA openings, internships, or entry-level opportunities.

If you have any advice, leads, or opportunities, please feel free to comment or send me a message. Thank you for your time and support!

I DO LIVE IN PENNSYLVANIA BUT I AM WILLING TO MOVE!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

items.title: Harry Potter Korean light #harrypotter #cochrochjantaparty #facebookdrma @हाइलाइट 𝐃𝐑𝐀𝐌𝐀 𝐊𝐈𝐍𝐆 The Korean Vegan Drama Dramestic Anuj Raj Filmy Clips Hub স্বদেশ Sweta Pal

items.text:
𝗟𝗼𝗼𝗸𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗯𝗮𝗰𝗸𝗴𝗿𝗼𝘂𝗻𝗱 𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘀 𝗶𝗻 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗣𝗵𝗼𝗲𝗻𝗶𝘅 𝗮𝗿𝗲𝗮 𝘁𝗼 𝗽𝗹𝗮𝘆 𝗗𝗜𝗡𝗡𝗘𝗥 𝗣𝗔𝗥𝗧𝗬 𝗙𝗥𝗜𝗘𝗡𝗗𝗦 𝗶𝗻 𝗮 𝗻𝗼𝗻-𝘂𝗻𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝘀𝗵𝗼𝗿𝘁 𝗳𝗶𝗹𝗺 𝘀𝗵𝗼𝗼𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝘄𝗲𝗲𝗸𝗲𝗻𝗱 𝗼𝗳 **𝗝𝘂𝗹𝘆 𝟭𝟬-𝟭𝟮.**

• • • • •

𝐍𝐎, 𝐈’𝐌 𝐍𝐎𝐓 is a character-driven black comedy exploring identity, gender, and mental health through the lens of a heteronormative relationship that has all the ingredients to work out, but simply doesn't. Think a strange blend of 𝘔𝘢𝘳𝘳𝘪𝘢𝘨𝘦 𝘚𝘵𝘰𝘳𝘺 with 𝘚𝘩𝘰𝘳𝘵𝘤𝘰𝘮𝘪𝘯𝘨𝘴 that insists on a 𝘉𝘶𝘳𝘯 𝘈𝘧𝘵𝘦𝘳 𝘙𝘦𝘢𝘥𝘪𝘯𝘨 vibe.

Primarily targeting Sundance, Telluride, and SXSW (splitting the difference sensibility-wise). Team's past project "Afraid of Tomorrow" received a Best Picture nomination at Cannes Short Film Festival. 19 minutes, shot in 6K.

• • • • •

𝗔𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘀 𝘄𝗶𝗹𝗹 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗲𝗶𝘃𝗲:
• 𝘐𝘔𝘋𝘣 𝘤𝘳𝘦𝘥𝘪𝘵
• 𝘙𝘦𝘦𝘭 𝘧𝘰𝘰𝘵𝘢𝘨𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘶𝘴𝘦 𝘱𝘳𝘪𝘷𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘭𝘺
• 𝘊𝘳𝘢𝘧𝘵 𝘴𝘦𝘳𝘷𝘪𝘤𝘦
• 𝘎𝘢𝘴 𝘳𝘦𝘪𝘮𝘣𝘶𝘳𝘴𝘦𝘮𝘦𝘯𝘵
• 𝘈 𝘧𝘶𝘯 𝘵𝘪𝘮𝘦 𝘰𝘯 𝘴𝘦𝘵!

𝗘𝗺𝗮𝗶𝗹 create@christopherfung.com 𝗶𝗳 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗱!

items.text: Go behind the scenes of Hollywood’s golden age of voice over with legendary voice actor, coach, and demo producer Marc Graue. Tales From The Hollywood Voice Over Vault features unforgettable stories, rare behind-the-scenes moments, celebrity encounters, studio adventures, and lessons learned from decades in the entertainment industry. New episodes drop every week, taking you inside the world of voice over like never before! #voiceover #Hollywood #BehindTheScenesa ##HollywoodStories #voiceactor #marcgraue #legendary #voiceovercoach #studiostories #voice

user.name: Spokane, WA - The Dinner Detective True Crime Murder Mystery Dinner Show (Spokane, WA)

items.text:
🎟 Looking for one of the best things to do in Spokane on Saturday, June 13th? 🎟 Use this special code **DDSWA** 

www.thedinnerdetective.com/spokane

The Dinner Detective combines dinner, comedy, mystery, and audience participation into one unforgettable evening. The actors are hidden throughout the crowd, making every guest part of the experience.

Perfect for couples, friend groups, celebrations, and team outings.

Reserve your seats and see if you can solve the mystery.

pageName.name: Spokane, WA - The Dinner Detective True Crime Murder Mystery Dinner Show (Spokane, WA)

user.name: Spokane, WA - The Dinner Detective True Crime Murder Mystery Dinner Show (Spokane, WA)

sharedPost.text:
🌐 Book Now: https://www.thedinnerdetective.com/spokane
🎟️ Use Code to save on June 13th: DDSWA
🚨 Spokane's most wanted event is back!

If you're searching for something beyond the typical dinner date, The Dinner Detective delivers an unforgettable night of mystery, comedy, and audience interaction.

You'll share dinner with suspects.
You'll gather clues.
You'll accuse the wrong person.
(Probably 😆)

The question is...Can YOU catch the culprit?

Grab your partner, friends, coworkers, or family and experience why guests keep coming back for more.

items.text:
MALE ACTOR / DANCER URGENTLY NEEDED!

We are looking for a Male South Yorkshire based actor / dancer (18+) for our brand new show ‘Wig-Or-Mortis’ a drag-lipsync musical, never seen and never done before. 

The show will be premiering at Crookes Social Club on March 20th 2027 with a potential for other shows at other venues.

The role is UNPAID however travel costs can be discussed, distance dependent. The role requires acting and also dancing (neither are essential).

Get to work in a super fun environment with likeminded actors and constant collaboration.

Please fill out the form below to register interest or email tmcdonnell800@gmail.com for further information.

items.text:
**NOW CASTING UK CONTENT CREATORS** 📣

Paid commercial campaign for Sensodyne.

We’re looking for warm, engaging people who create content online, feel confident on camera, and genuinely experience sensitive teeth.

This is a social-first style campaign focused on real people and authentic conversation, so we’re much more interested in personality, relatability and ease on camera than polished influencer-style content or huge followings.

Lifestyle, wellness, food, parenting, reviews, everyday life, humour etc all welcome.

**Important note:**
This is NOT an influencer deliverables campaign and no posting to your own social channels is required.

**Shoot details:**
• London
• 2nd and/or 3rd July
• Likely 1–2 shoot days

**Fees:**
• £350 per shoot day
• £8,000 usage fee if featured in the final campaign

**If interested, please email:**
casting@casperblackcasting.com

**Please include:**
• Name
• Age
• Location
• Social handles
• Contact number
• A little note about your experience with sensitive teeth

Thank you!

Casper x

Please feel free to tag/share with anybody who may be a great fit ✨

Hey everyone!

I'm a casting producer for Property Brothers and casting is now OPEN for homeowners with big reno dreams (and maybe a few “what did we get ourselves into?” moments ) in Vancouver!

We’re looking for:
• Homeowners who have **recently purchased a home**
• A minimum renovation budget of **$75K**
• At least **3 rooms** in need of renovation
• Availability for filming in **Fall 2026**

Feel free to apply: [https://www.drewandjonathan.com/casting/](https://www.drewandjonathan.com/casting/)

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

topComments.text: Hey. Have you ever thought of doing renos for seniors living in mobile homes? Like me, my home is showing signs of old age and can't afford the upkeep or avoiding the scams/overpricing seniors, especially since us baby boomers are living longer too.🤪
Why in the world would anybody do this, so basically it’s a cosmetic renovation that you have to pay at least $75,000 without a say in the outcome. What in the world would you get out of it?

OPEN CALL
Арт-резиденция EDEN приглашает творческих, креативных личностей на ART‑FEST EDEN по волонтерским программам.

ВКЛЮЧЕНО: проживание, питание, работа в Эден, участие и создание мероприятий и ART‑FEST, материалы творцам, обучение для подмастерьев.

▪РЕЗИДЕНТ - ТВОРЕЦ:
1-5 дней, создавать, творить и помогать в Эден. О программе 👉🏻 https://art-grigor.ucoz.com/index/rezidence_art_garden_eden/0-25

▪РЕЗИДЕНТ - ПОДМАСТЕРЬЕ:
7-14 дней, обучаться и помогать в Эден. О программе 👉🏻 https://art-grigor.ucoz.com/index/rezidence_art_garden_eden/0-25

Даты по волонтерским программам:
▪Июнь 9 - 22
▪Июль 1 - 12
▪Август 17 - 30
▪Сентябрь 8 - 21
▪Октябрь 24 сент - 6 окт

Об #ART_FEST_EDEN
для художников, творческих людей из сферы искусства, кто находится в поисках нового яркого опыта, знаний, единомышленников.
🌹 Вардавар - Горящая роза, 10-12 июля

Куратор - художник Владимир Григорян.

НА ФЕСТИВАЛЕ ИСКУССТВ
•Отдых на природе,
•Пленэры, обучение, мастер‑классы, творчество и презентации, выставка, концерт.
• Кинопоказы, музыка, танцы и песни у костра;
• Пир с шашлыками;
• Спорт и развлечения.

🎯 ЦЕЛЬ: Создавать, созерцать и вдохновляться искусством и природой. Творчество, обмен опытом, общение и отдых на природе!

ТВОРЧЕСКИЕ НАПРАВЛЕНИЯ: живопись, графика, скульптура, ДПИ, фото, видео‑арт, дизайн, музыка, поэзия, театр, танцы...

ТВОРЧЕСКАЯ ТЕМА:
🔥Огонь и 🌊 Вода
Приглашаем поразмыслить, творить на тему контрастов и баланса противоположностей стихий и чувств, Огня (отдых, игры, любовь) и Воды (творчество, разум, сосредоточенность).
Встретим вместе яркий летний праздник Вардавар (Горящей розы - Преображение Господня) - это сочетание древних традиций и современного веселья, символ обновления жизни и любви! Главная традиция - обливание водой 😉

📝 ФОРМА ЗАЯВКИ - https://art-grigor.ucoz.com/index/rezidence_art_garden_eden/0-25#бронировать

По всем вопросам пишите в комментарии или в личные сообщения.

items.text:
**🌴 CASTING NOW: DATING NAKED UK, SERIES 3 🌴**

Calling all **body-confident, extrovert singles aged 20+** who are ready for a once-in-a-lifetime dating adventure abroad.

MTV and Paramount+ are looking for fun, confident singles to travel to a gorgeous tropical location, meet other singles, look for love and potentially win a cash prize as part of **Dating Naked UK, Series 3**.

The cast will be living together, going on dates and taking part in activities while fully naked for the majority of the show, with nudity unblurred for broadcast, so applicants must be genuinely comfortable with this.

Filming is planned for **late summer 2026** and will last approximately **3 weeks**. There is payment for participation, as well as a potential cash prize.

Safety and welfare are a huge priority, with measures including an intimacy coordinator, intimacy training for both cast and casting team, and on-set welfare support throughout production.

Applicants must be **single** and aged **20+ as of 27 April 2026**.

My DMs are open if you’d like to have a chat, have any questions, or want to know more.

Ready to apply? Click here:
[https://shortaudition.com/Dating-Naked-UK?origin=Gabe](https://shortaudition.com/Dating-Naked-UK?origin=Gabe)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL! **We are looking for leading cast roles in commutable distance to Portsmouth for our annual pantomime - this year is Pinocchio! Produced in-house and performed alongside a cast of local child actors, this year's production aims to be the most fun and accessible panto in Portsmouth! 

 

**Details of roles, dates and auditions: **[https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting](https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting)

 

We're a community led theatre and as such cast members will be expected to work alongside young people, children and our volunteers - and look to have fun in the process!

 

For consideration, please submit a self tape including requested audition scenes and songs on the link above, indicating the specific role you’re applying for by 18 June 2026 to casting@groundlings.co.uk

See link in our post to find out more! Groundlings ndlingsTheatre,Portsmouth Theatre, Groundlings THIATH'

We need skilled and talented actors and actresses who are fluent English speakers for these roles:

- *Coach Pascal* (55, male) – University sports coach  
- *Grandmother / Mama Grace* (60s–70s)  
- *Uncle John* (30s)  
- *Tinache’s Mother* (40s) – a real “aunty” type  
- *Minister* (40s) – wedding planner

Thank you!

*Note:* Submissions close Friday, 5 June. Auditions must be sent by Thursday, 4 June.

Thank you!

Hi! I am a Brazilian professional model with experience in fashion, commercial, and creative photography. I am currently spending a short period of time in Poland, based in the Cieszyn area, but I am available to travel to Kraków, Warsaw, and other nearby locations.

I am primarily looking opportunities; however, I am also open to collaborating on high-quality photo shoots that can enhance my portfolio and involve experienced professionals.

Please feel free to contact me if you believe we could be a good match for a project.

Train in ways that both challenge and excite you. 

Booking now open for Meisner 1 Fundamentals & Repetition. 🕺💃

The last few have sold out. So be quick! 🏃‍♀️🏃💨

Come join our community! 🫶

Train for Authenticity, Perform with Power. 🎭🎬

Unleash your authentic self and discover new emotional depths in your performances. The Meisner technique transforms more than just your acting—it transforms you.

Class is limited to 12 students.

Meisner Technique - Intro & Repetition Skills
Book Now @ www.bodymindvoice.co.uk/meisner-intro
 Consent-informed connection and sustainable emotional exploration - unlock your true potential!

📅 Course Details:
* Dates: Wednesdays, 4 pm – 7 pm
* Duration: 17 June - 22nd July
* Location: Marylebone, London
* Class Size: Limited to 12 places for personal attention

🎟️ What’s Included: ✅ Six guided in-person sessions ✅ 1 personalised feedback session ✅ 1 FREE drop-in Actor Training Session for continued practice 🎉

Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced actor looking to refresh your skills, this course will help you tap into deeper dynamics and develop truthful behaviour in your work.

💰 Fees:
* £225 for 20+ hours of training
* £205 each if you bring a friend (save £20 each!) 💥

The Meisner Technique has consistently proven to build truthful, dynamic acting—the glue that ties all disciplines together! 💡 Join us in a fun, supportive environment that fosters genuine connection and growth. 🌱

BOOK NOW: www.bodymindvoice.co.uk/meisner-intro
Or email - mail@lawrencecarmichael.com

⚡ Limited to just 12 places—secure your spot today!

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

✨ WE’RE HIRING ✨
Happily Ever After Princesses is looking for magical new performers to join our royal team! 👑

Do you love bringing fairytales to life? We’re on the lookout for talented, reliable, and passionate performers who can sing, sparkle, and make dreams come true.

📩 To apply, please send the following to happilyeverafterprincesses1@gmail.com

💫 Your CV

🎤 A singing reel

📸 A recent headshot

Applications are now open — we can’t wait to meet our next princess! 💕

#PrincessPerformer #CastingCall #NowHiring #PrincessJobs #HappilyEverAfterPrincesses

items.text:
We are so excited to present an amazing group of 30 models walking in not one, but two runways tomorrow at Orlando International Fashion Week 2026! @orlandofashionweek_int @starrdalton 

They will be showcasing designs from @mylittlematilda and @matildacouturedresses where we have been offering age-appropriate formal wear for all ages since 2010.

Our collections are designed as elegant formal wear you can wear to any special occasion. These are not costumes or themed outfits—they are true formal fashion pieces for every age, created to celebrate style, confidence, and timeless elegance. #mylittlematilda #oifw #orlando #florida
